name: Broiled Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive Oil or Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions: Place beef steaks in a shallow glass or plastic dish. Mix the remaining ingredients and pour over the beef. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, turning occasionally. Set oven control to broil. Place beef on rack in broiler pan. Broil with the tops about 3 inches from the heat until brown, approximately 5 minutes. Turn beef and continue broiling for about 5 minutes longer. Cut beef into thin strips across the grain of the meat. Serve with tortillas and guacamole if desired.
